review_text:
First time camping and it was fantastic..will definitely be back.
Office staff very friendly and helpful.

We celebrated our son’s birthday at the holiday park and he had an amazing time enjoying all the facilities. A big thank‑you to the lovely ladies at reception for making him feel so special — especially Kate. She was incredibly thoughtful and really made his day. He couldn’t stop talking to her afterwards!
Cabins are great, phone service isnt crash hot but you can get free WiFi location is close to everything

Honestly hand down the best travel destination for families who have a child under five years old. The under cover indoor heated pool was so amazing and well protected from the sun, the jungle play ground only for children under 5 years old was perfect as it too was under cover and suitable for all weather. It was the perfect place and we will definitely go back time and time again.

Amazing service from very friendly staff. Great facilities. Indoor heated pool means swimming all year round. Some great beaches not too far away with very calm waters. Looking forward to coming back again.

First time here at ingenia soldiers point and we will definitely be back. So much for the kids to do! We have a grassed area with an ensuite and it's probably one of the nicest ensuite sites we have had.
Love this caravan park! A nice cafe at a stone throw distance! Nice pool and spa onsite. We enjoyed our stay and extended one more night :)
Stayed in the Airstream, land yacht had to bring the caprice to sit along side. Was a great time and the activities bowling table tennis and heated pool, was the best!
Great experience for the kids - all ages 👌🏼👌🏼👌🏼

Tent site is great! Facilities are good! Just the jumping area got no shades. The reasons I gave 1 start because the staff at the reception are not nice. They are not welcoming guests. What I feel was they trying to pass the job to others. I felt not helpful at all.

What a beautiful place! What wonderful service! My daughter had her 6th birthday and the wonderful people at the reception sang happy birthday to her and made her feel even more special. ♡ Thank you! We highly recommend this place in every way! We'll happily return someday.

As we stayed in one of the new cabins, Clean, fresh , no problems other than 3 different tvs to try & learn , couldn’t get normal tv for the 1st night, but the three other family groups that stayed were mucked around by the cleaners,, the bbq on the deck of the Airstream were left uncleaned, the tray underneath was full of water & oil which is dangerous, the bedding in both vans are hard as a rock, the bedding in the other cabin needed replacing ( badly stained) , The Airstream vans ( Both) have never been washed or polished since they were put there, we have all stayed before with no problems, so the team need to pick up there game, or we will never be back !!

Well maintained Park. Definitely a kids paradise. Cabins spacious and clean. Staff helpful and friendly. One room the best parks we have stayed in. Coffee Van in the morning bonus. Highly recommended,

Stayed here with my wife and two kids for 5 days ,where can i start cleanness of the room was really bad the carpet in the room there was ants on the beds in the rooms ,carpet bugs everywhere and cockroaches in the bathroom ,the carpet looked like it has not been cleaned in 10 years ,the lounge also has not been cleaned since its been placed there ,i had to place a blanket over the lounge just so we can sit on it as we were getting a rashes all over our bodies, toilets were disgusting the smell was awful doesn't look like the ever clean them properly ,the rangehood had so much grease that every time you used the stove the grease will fall on your food because of the heat,so we had to eat at a restaurant everyday

the shower pressure was so weak goodluck getting the shampoo and body wash off takes 20 min ,not to mention the strong chlorine smell coming out of the water taps and shower head ,the water was making our eyes super red from the chlorine ,the drains stink every time it was hot outside you would have to cover your nose just to use the toilets, awful smell , two bed sheets had blood stan's on them , the kids outdoor public pool had edges broken off pool it never been fixed just left for someone to get hurt, very dangerous for kids !

this is my honest review everything that i experienced here , i would avoid this holiday park at all cost save your money go somewhere else a motel will be 10 times better than this horrible  place waste of money, hopefully this review helps someone from coming here !

A great holiday park, very tidy, lots of activies.
The only negative is lack of supervision in the pool area.
Bigger kids doing bombs and jumping off rocks spoiing it for everyone else. Other parents too scared or PC to chastise them.

I’ve stayed at the big4 Ingenia holidays soldiers point many times now and every time it’s marvellous. The best part about the holiday park are the staff - they are so friendly welcoming and will you make sure you have the best holiday.

They have an indoor heated pool and an outdoor pool with a slide. I came down the slide a bit too fast, it was funny, had to be there 😂

They also have a bowling alley jumping pad. I didn’t go with any children but they run heaps of activities for school holidays and bringing in coffee vans and food trucks. Really a beautiful part of the world. Highly recommend. 💯

This place is amazing. The best park we have ever stayed at. Something for all ages to enjoy. The upkeep and cleanliness was impecable. The toilet/ shower set up is the best we have used and the fact they were cleaned 4 times a day meant facilities were always so clean. We will be back for sure.
The site that we had for our Motorhome was very spacious.  More than enough room to have our awning out and privacy screens out.

Unfortunately there were several groups staying at this park that all knew each other that caused an absolute headache for every other guest both day and night. They trashed most areas of the park, were loud and rough while playing and just generally loud and annoying. This was reported to management several times by several different unrelated guests however nothing was done. This park seems to be the go to for friends of this group so I would be careful to not book in case you’ll be joined by this group.
Treated to a night of drunken disorderly conduct by uncontrolled guests. Stay away if you are a family trying to enjoy family time. Great place for drunk grubs to thrive. Management has no clue.
Super friendly staff, great Bangalow cabins, kids friendly facilities
Awesome
Absolutely loved this place! The cabin was so nice and clean. The facilities were great, kids had a fantastic time. Reception staff were so lovely to deal with.

I had a wonderful stay with my daughter and grandchildren for my granddaughters birthday, Along with another mum and her 2 kids - we shared two camp sites which had the fake grass , which I thought was a great idea , although the ground underneath was a little soft for the tent pegs to hold in places but still  worked . We were so close to everything which allowed a bit more relaxation for the adults whilst we could still watch the kids on most activities , which made it all so much easier and more fun for everyone. The park staff were really helpful and accommodating in helping with a couple of things which really made it all more enjoyable ( like water the jumping pillow when it was too hot to use ) the kids said this was their favourite thing to do

Great caravan park especially for kids.
As a family we highly recommend and will return.
Such a great mix of activities for the whole family.
2 pools one indoor that is heated and an outside one with a slide.
The staff are so friendly and keep the park very clean and well maintained. The Bbq areas are great.
This is our third time at the Ingenia Soldiers Point and it never disappoints. It’s filled with activities for the kids, a great family place!
Staff very accomodating and easy to deal with. Immaculate presentation and ensuites well kept.
Fantastic holiday park. Nice clean cabins. Wonderful staff and plenty of activities for the kids. Would recommend highly.

As a big friendship/family group (40 of us this time!) we holiday together often. And this was one of the best locations we’ve stayed at. Various cabin choices, plenty for the kids to do (playground, jumping pillow, indoor & outdoor pool, grass area, pedal carts, bowling), didn’t feel overcrowded, close to the beach, close to food (bowling club and a great pub) and a short drive to shops. Take your friends & family, it’s great.
Fantastic set up. Park has so much to keep kids entertained. Cabin was well appointed, clean and comfortable.

I've stayed at a lot of BIG4 parks with my young son, usually at least once a month, so I was a bit taken back at the price when booking here. But I figured I'd give it a go, and honestly, I'm 100% happy I did. The stay was well worth the premium compared to other parks.

There was so much to keep the kids entertained, way more than just the standard jump pad you get at most parks. The amenities were top notch too, each shower cubicle was basically its own 3m square private bathroom with an inbuilt bath, which made things so much easier with a little one.

The sites were really well maintained, and the park was full of young families, so my son had plenty of new friends to play with. It had a great atmosphere, safe and friendly.

All up, I think this is going to become our new default park. Worth every cent.

Came for 2 night as a family with 3 kids under 7. Stayed in the sandy cabins which were newly renovated and immaculate
The facilities were awesome and would def stay here again

Retirement goals, right here. Lovely park, heaps to do. Absolutely loved watching the kids running around with ‘wild’ birds sitting on their heads and arms, amazing bird life. Inoffensive permanents. Beautiful inside and outside pools & the reception staff were all absolutely lovely.
Amenities were 10/10 except I wasn’t a fan of the unisex facilities. If I didn’t have pre teen kids it probably wouldn’t have worried me, but you can never be to careful these days, and unisex just gave me the not safe going alone vibe.
Apart from that though, we loved it & would highly recommend 😍
Best park I have stayed at
Well maintained modern facilities, friendly helpful staff, nice play areas for kids and indoor heated pool.

My family accompanied with friends just stayed at the Park and we had such a good time! Weather was average with lots of rain but with the bowling alley and indoor heated pool it didn’t bother us one bit. The ensuite powered site was soo clean and practical. Staff were super friendly. We lost our ensuite key and they told us to go home and let us know if we find it when we unpacked instead of making us pay straight away which I thought was such a nice thing for them to do!
The kids had such a great time. Highly reccomend!

We really enjoyed our stay here. A bit tight for our van, but we got it in.
Helpful staff and good facilities.
Perfect for kids. There was enough to keep them entertained despite the fact in rained all weekend!

Playground, indoor soft play area, big bouncing thing, loads of friendly birds, they had great activities during school holidays at least like, movies, send art, rock painting... However we did choose it here because of the heated indoor pool which was cold... They said they were fixing it though. Great that it has the bowling and a restaurant just next door. And great place for pizza delivery. Rooms were cleanish, don't look under the beds or on the top of the closet.

We absolutely loved our stay at Ingenia BIG4 Soldiers Point! The park is incredibly family friendly with so much to do the water park, heated pool and playground kept my children entertained for hours. The Aloha cabins were clean and comfortable. The staff were warm and helpful and the whole park had such a relaxed, welcoming vibe. It’s in a great location too with a wharf for fishing across the road and food options and town nearby. We made so many fun memories here and can’t wait to come back!

A beautiful park in a relaxing,peaceful place.
A couple with our own van we took advantage of a powered site with ensuite/laundry.
Fantastic facilities.
Our stay so comfortable in a lovely park catering to all ages .
Looking around the park plenty for families to do,fantastic camping facilities with great amenities and camp kitchen.
Next door to the club,walking distance to many cafes and eateries.
Short drive to supermarket.
Enjoyed morning beach walks(access across the road)morning coffees at Sea Salt however if didn’t want to wait,coffee van offered service each morning.
We will definitely be staying here again.
Thankyou for your wonderful hospitality.

Thank you to the wonderful team at Ingenia Soldier's Point. We had a beautiful stay here, perfect for little ones and adults alike. A short stroll to the beach and next to Soldier's Point bowlo. The team was so friendly and helpful, they made us welcome from the get go.
They have good amenities with cost associated. Room has live ants on the bed, kettle was dirty.

Still  extremely poor wifi connection even 5g
There’s 4 public ev chargers (7kw/h) but 3 out of 4 chargers installed in cabin carpark which can’t use when the cabin occupies by someone else.
The jumping pillow have moved out of the fence, looks bigger than before but it is not under-covered anymore.
Indoor heated pool always is the best and clean toilet/bathroom is second best!
I have been visiting over 10 caravan parks so far, Ingenia soldiers point is my top1
Great for the little ones!

Kind staff..
Very clean..
Tent sites are scattered just filling up empty lots. Went camping with 5 families, tent sites can only fit 2 tents and our friends spot was two blocks away

Staff at the Soldiers point BIG4 are the nicest I have come across.
My health deteriorated, and the wonderful young receptionists was a real gem.
I would HIGHLY recommend this terrific holiday park.
Great place to stay. Clean neat and tidy.
Been here twice now can't wait to come back friendly staff great location  very clean park and rooms , great activities     within the park
Such an awesome place,  Location is amazing for kids,  straight across the road from the jetty for fishing,  the bird life is amazing.
We have stayed at several CP with our motorhome but this one was by far the best. Great location, great amenities and Mel was so very helpful.  I would highly recommend.

We stayed in our caravan. The amenities were excellent. I especially appreciated the heated pool to keep up my hydrotherapy excercises. Reception were friendly and helpful and although we had plans with friends elswhere there is a bowling club next door and a pub across the road for meals.
5 star campground. Kids paradise, spotless, exceptionaly friendly staff, great amenities. We hardly stay longer than one night in the same place but here, we did three ❤️
Very family friendly with lots of fun activities for the kids. Staff are friendly and helpful, lots of nice things close by as well. Really enjoyed our time here!

Overall it was good. The park was good. The only drawback was reception was not friendly. They were not welcoming. We were 3 family and supposed to check out on Sunday and it was raining very heavily we told them we will move the car outside at 11 with the other family when they checkout because we dont want kids to get wet but they said you need to take the car out. I understand that you need to follow the time but can't you be more polite and flexible to give some workaround to adjust for 1 hour.
All in one, not to mention everything is very clean. Groundsman was a little rude but aside from that we had a fantastic stay

Close to shops and plenty of facilities in the park. Kids love the outdoors and indoors pool. The park was built with max land usage so you are very close to your neighbours. We have a tent setup right outside our bedroom window so blinds down the whole time. The cabin we book was clean and nice. The bunk bedroom is very small beware if your kids are older or tall. The mobile coffee van comes by every morning was a nice touch over Easter.
Great park for kids. Very clean. A little pricey but facilities excel. Walk through to Bowling club next door. Great TV reception but very poor internet and telstra mobile reception.

Mega toller Campingplatz. Vorallem für die Kinder. Wir hatten einen Stellplatz und unsere eigene Dusche/WC mit Waschmaschine/Tumbler. Super feine Duschmittel, Lotions und Conditioner. Saubere und sehr weisse Duschtücher. Sogar Waschmittel lag reichlich bereit.

Super nettes Personal! Am Samstagabend sogar Sicherheitspersonal, welche seine Runden drehen und für Ruhe sorgen 22:00 Uhr.

Great holiday for a young family.
All the amenities are well kept.
Just found that the floors in the cabin were quite dirty when we arrived so I mopped them. We needed to use a portacot and it just fit in the space. The Jungle Bungle toddler play space also needs some love, there was a few broken items.

This is one of the best big 4 parks we have ever stayed at! Had heaps of things to do with our toddlers.
Staff was also amazing and very pleasant to talk to!
Will definitely be back again!!
you can not ask for more for a family holiday,water park tennis great for kids everything for kids to do

We stay often and love the experience every time. The facilities and cabins are clean, the atmosphere is very relaxing and best of all there is so much for the kids to do. Fantastic value for money as we often happily stay put for the duration of our stay. I wanted to make a special mention also that we stayed midweek, off-peak season and everything is just as well-maintained. It is appreciated.

My family had a fantastic time. The facilities are great for kids there was always something for them to do. The cabin was clean and well appointed. Although the queen size bed had a considerable dip in the mattress it needed replacing. All in all we had an excellent time and will definitely be back in the future.

Fantastic place to stay. We booked the ensuite camping site to use with our camper trailer. Clean facilities, plenty of space and great access to the park features. The kids loved it, we were happy with our stay. Highly recommend for an easy week away.
Very expensive in peak season, unfortunately the only tent site left for a late booking was too small for a family tent.

Great family camping ground with many kids friendly activities provided by the staffs. The indoor swimming pool area had slides for toddlers then the water is quite deep, supervision is required at all times. When we visited the outdoor water play area was closed due to weather conditions but it looks fun to play for kids. During our stay. Coffee van arrived each morning to enjoy the nice coffee and a fish and chips food truck also came which sorted us for another easy dinner with kids.
Amazing place if you have kids
Would not recommend due to poor customer service.
Charging $165 a night for a Caravan powered site is ridiculous and disgusting....I could get a hotel room for that much...
Great location.  I rented a cabin which was good. My son had tent. Seemed happy 😊

Absolutely loved our stay. Everything was fantastic from the cleanliness of the cabins to the amazing staff to the fabulous amenities and children's play areas. Everything awesome. I would definitely recommend this place to everyone
One of my favourite holiday parks so far. Thank you for your kind hospitality, cleanliness and fantastic amenities. Would definitely come again!

I had a terrible experience at the reception of this BIG4 INGENIA HOLIDAY . After driving 3 hours with my 3 kids, we arrived an hour early for check-in and needed to use the toilet. The receptionist refused to let us use the facilities until we officially checked in and instead told us to find someone else’s toilet. This was extremely inconvenient and unprofessional, especially given the circumstances. Hospitality should come with some basic courtesy—very disappointing start to our trip.

HOW THE HELL DO YOU TELL PAYING CUSTOMERS TO USE THE NEXT DOOR TOILET
Great campground, a lot of things to do around . Also, kids loved the inside pool . We have stayed here twice and both times it was fun! Campground kept clean and tidy. We will be back for sure 😊

It has been an amazing stay for us this past week. So many things we can do onsite, the indoor pool, the bowling alley, the playground, the indoor kiddie play area and more. The room was clean and tidy. The staff were very friendly and helpful. The location is great, close to a lot of beaches. Kids loved it. It’s just so perfect. Will definitely go back 😊😊

I booked accommodation in October with the intention of taking advantage of the Early Bird pricing, despite the cost being equivalent to a hotel stay for just two nights. I assumed there would be flexibility to cancel closer to the date if needed.

Unfortunately, when I reached out six weeks later to cancel, I was informed that the full payment would be forfeited. For a caravan park, this rigid policy and lack of flexibility are extremely disappointing, especially given the circumstances.

I have been advised against travel as I will be 37 weeks pregnant at the time of the booking. It is disheartening to see that customer service is unwilling to consider these exceptional circumstances or provide a partial refund.

This experience has left me feeling frustrated and dissatisfied. I will not book here again and would caution others about the lack of customer-centric policies.

We stayed in a powered caravan site. We loved the way each site was designed to offer as much privacy as possible with gardens containing tall tropical-looking plants on each side and at the back of the site.
The bathrooms were the best we have ever seen.  Really well thought out, especially for families.

My husband and I stayed here for 3 nights in Oct.2024. We stayed in Kentia Cabin K21. Our cabin was very close to the VERY NOISY indoor heated pool's motor/filter/generator which ran 24/7.
We had no peace & quite. We had to close our door just to hear the television and closed our windows at night to sleep.
Disappointed and a waste of money for us - we paid $657 for the 3 nights. The park was aware of the noise problem & offered no refund to us.
Sick and tired of the greedy money hungry companies that happily take your money but don't keep there side of the deal. The park has a "quite time" between 10pm and 8am. This park did not adhere to it's own rules!
Only stay here if you can get a cabin FAR AWAY from that noisy heated pool motor.

Fantastic facilities for the kids and a beautiful location. We stayed in an ensuite site for an overnight stopover. The ensuite was clean and modern, and the site itself was spacious and felt private even though there were other campers on either side of us. I attribute the sense of privacy to the mature palms and tropical plants that bordered the site. Convenient location, only a short stroll to the beach and next door to the bowlong club where we had a delicious meal. The only downside is that we didn't stay long enough!
First stay at this resort. Our Family stay across two cabins. We had a Wonderful 4 day stay, and the whole Family enjoyed the stay and many wonderful facilities and activities. Thank You!
Only went for look around  looks quite a good set up close to eateries

Kids have plenty to do here. Indoor (heated) and outdoor pools (a bit deep though) play ground, jumping pillow, kids size tennis court, a kids play area for 5 and below and a bowling alley. Saw a few people in hired tricycles. The villa we were in was enough. Hot water works. Noise from others minimal. Would come back

Soldiers point was a 2.5 hour drive from Sydney, very easy to get to and no hard roads to travel on along the way.

We booked to stay in the Sandy Cabin for 3 nights. There are only 2 sandy cabins available at the place and we were lucky enough to extend for 1 more night as it was still available. The cabin was very modern and had such a great homey feel to it. Definitely clean and newer, the furniture felt new and just super comfy.

Small kitchen area had the main things your needs like a fridge, pantry, microwave, toaster, kettle, coffee machine, pots and pans, electric stove with exhaust fan and a dish washer. Make sure to bring your own dishwahsing liquid/tablets and hand wash as not supplied in the cabins.

The bathroom was very clean and modernised. Toilet seat felt a bit loose, shower was amazing as the shower head was like a rain fall feel. Blow-dryer was available as well and they supplied shampoo conditioner and body wash plus hand soap in the bathroom, no need to bring your shampoo because these are provided in the cabin, just bring your own air freshener 😉

The rooms were super cosy and felt so comfy. Bed and bedsheets were clean and we felt super warm as there were extra blankets in the cabinets. I loved how there were TVs in both rooms. The outlet for your charger was easily accessible and also had a USB charging port in case you down have the port available you can just plug in the cord for your charger.

The living room was very spacious and sofa was super comfy and can also be slept on. The aircon was super strong and remote was easy to access. There was wifi available which you have to connect the TV's to if you wanted to watch YouTube or Netflix. The tables in the dining area and lounge were a nice marble finish. Definitely elegant and very nice as it matched the couch and cushions.

Overall our experience was amazing. The staff are super friendly, extending for another night was very easy to do, you only needed 1 key to access the cabin which locked both main glass door and screen door. The front door for the Sandy Cabin is not a door, it's like a sliding door, they also had blinds which made it easy to close and open at your preference. The reception desk always sent messages in the morning to advise of the coffee van arriving for people to purchase coffee, also for other activities that were available to do for that day.

The bowling club was super convenient to walk to as it was right next door. Other shops were also convenient to get to, I'd definitely recommend families with children to stay at this place for at least 4-5 nights as there's so many things to do that you wouldn't want to miss out on all the fun.

Amazing holiday park....plenty for the kids to do
Happy ,friendly,helpful staff
10 out of 10 love it here don't 2 want to go home....

Always love to stay
Good indoor play area and swimming pool

Terrible experience. Told staff a violent man had entered that a friend was avoiding there. A staff member stood in front of him and allowed him to rant for 10 minutes to this woman who was in fear of her safety. Told staff member repeatedly to send him out. They said nothing to him. An unwelcome visitor should be escorted out immediately. Unbelievably. They actually called the police when I left because I was so angry with them. What the. Security is disgraceful. And they think they did the right thing.

We love it here.This is our second visit this year.Love your heated indoor pool for the cooler months.Staff very friendly,cabins nice and clean and well stocked and very comfortable.. Loved our morning visits with the lorikeets.

I booked with Ingenia soldiers point a while back. Due to a family emergency I had to cancel, to which I gave a months notice. Ingenia refused a full refund so I settled for park credit. When I went to rebook, the price of the stay was going to be $736. The original stay was going to be $318 at the same park. ||Ingenia was also forcing me to take an extra day as it was just before a public holiday (not ON the public holiday) which of course defeats the purpose of going away for a long weekend as you end up having to take an extra day off work anyway, but this is somehow justified by the fact that many parks have adopted this unaustralian greedy policy. ||Considering the big4 6 minutes away was charging $450 for the same length of stay, I could not justify it. ||Ingenia has now charged me a $50 booking fee for absolutely nothing. I have spent $1000s with Big4 as a perks member so I contacted Big4 head office. They did not help at all as it was “out of their hands”. ||I understand that I am only one customer and my contribution will make zero difference, so saying I will not stay with Ingenia or Big4 is completely worthless. If that is the message you’re trying to send to your customers, well done, you have achieved it.
Nice park very cheap on-site powered site.  Beautiful walking to the long jetty.

Had a lovely stay at soldiers point! We stayed during winter and the indoor pool was brilliant for the kids! They also loved the park.
Also enjoyed a walk a small beach which was really nearby and easy walking distance.
The main toilet and shower block was brilliant! Heated floors and mirrors so the room dried out instantly following a shower. It was so warm in there.
We made the mistake of booking an en-suite pitch which I wouldn’t recommend in winter. There is no heat in there and the extractor fan doesn’t pull enough water/moisture out. Despite only quick showers, the room stayed wet the whole time (walls, floors, toilet etc) from condensation. It was so wet and damp in there we couldn’t really use it. Thankfully the main toilet block made up for this! We’d definitely return.

Honestly blown away by this place! We were offered a free upgrade and a few other tweaks when I called from the road on what was a very stressful day (car troubles, travelling from the Sunshine Coast). Michelle went out of her way to help, even adding some treats and a hand-written note to the after-hours check-in envelope (also a comprehensive and easy process) - and she left the heater on so we could warm up as soon as we arrived - BLISS!
The cabin (F111) was tastefully and thoughtfully decorated with plenty of space and nice touches. The kitchen was great - full sized fridge, oven, cooktop, microwave, electric frypan... everything you could need PLUS a BBQ on the balcony.
Everything was clean and I felt super safe being there with my children. The shower head was incredible as was the water pressure throughout. There were plenty of blankets and towels - literally everything you'd need... just rock up!
The park in general was great - very clean and tidy and safe for the kids. They loved the pool + slide (even though it was freezing) and loved the heated indoor pool too. The trikes were great fun and the Jungle Bungle and the bike track... everything was awesome!
Highly recommend - thank you for a great stay!
Great we'll set up caravan park. Clean modern amenities and friendly service.

Absolutely loved our stay at soldiers point! Plenty of things to do and the club only being a 1 minute walk is also great. The bathrooms are amazing and you even get your own toilet and shower. Definitely recommend this park. We will be back ✅️ Mick the greensman is absolutely legend always made sure everything was going okay.

Booked the powered site during winter (off peak period). Amenities specifically were top notch. Shower and toilet in a private room & very clean. Facilities were amazing too. We were amazed with the Bowling Alley that needed to be booked prior. Besides the usual outdoor pool with slides, it has an indoor heated pool too, great for all ages! Other than that, they have Pedal Cart to hire, huge Ball Pit area for kids under 5, well maintained Playground, Jumping Pad and Kids Clubroom for their daily activity program. Bring you fishing gear, we caught some fishes at Soldiers Point Jetty which is just across the Holiday park. Staffs were friendly and helpful too. We will definitely comeback here again!

This is the best place to enjoy a family holiday!

We stayed in an aloha cabin which was probably the cleanest holiday accomodation we’ve ever stayed in. It had all the amenities needed to keep a family comfortable - I especially appreciated the bath for our young kids and that there was space in the bedroom for a travel cot.

Even in winter, there were plenty of activities to keep our 3 year old and baby entertained. We enjoyed bowling, craft at the kids club, the indoor swimming pool, the jumping pillow, bike riding, and the outdoor and indoor playgrounds. All of the facilities were well maintained and clean.

The ladies in reception were pleasant to deal with and checking in and out was seamless.

It’s a fabulous location and a serene place to enjoy a break. We will be back!
I went with a friend it looked so clean and tidy.also quiet
Overall a lovely place to enjoy.Heated pool a bonus as main pool to cold now.

Spacious and generally clean cabins with good bed configurations, aircon works great, superb kitchenette amenities and impressive wifi setup - the casting to the TV was a bonus for bad weather days. The furniture could do with a bit of upkeep but not too shabby. Great variety of amenities including an outdoor pool with a slide, an indoor pool with a mini splash play area, a games room, a jumping pad, tennis and pickle ball courts, a decent sized communal lawn and play area for the kids. The green and peaceful surroundings gives the place a tropical feel. Well definitely revisit!

Our family had the most wonderful stay. Didn't matter the weather, there was so much for all of the family to do especially the kids.
The staff were all lovely and friendly and my children are already asking when we can return for our next holiday!
A great place to visit and make memories!

I hate writing a bad review but one was completed and sent to Ingenia and I don’t think they even bothered to read it. If they did they were being seriously sarcastic with their standard reply.|Poor loyalty from them.  We always rebook, same site, if we’ve had an enjoyable time. This time it wasn’t honoured. Sarcastic comments made as we took the Seniors deal and were not happy with being moved.|Really spoilt the holiday, it’s a nice park for kids but very noisy. Grounds and activities are lovely.|We won’t be back. To the manager…please take comments seriously. This might be of no concern to you but it is to us.

Very dissatisfied with this park as when we booked we had no knowledge of the rain event that was to happen. Contacted the park to hopefully arrange a transfer of dates as we were camping and with a 4 yr old the rain was not ideal and was told I could cancel but wouldn’t  receive a refund or date change! Will not rebook with this park!

Currently staying at Ingenia Soldiers Point, have been here 4 days and the noise from construction and tree lopping….non stop. We have not had one peaceful day on our precious holiday. I appreciate there are things that need to be attended to but we were never told by the park office we would be in the midst of a construction zone. I did tell the office ladies about this, I don’t think they cared to be honest.  So disappointing, zero customer service.  This is no bargain for a caravan park either, we expected better.
We have two days to go and I can’t wait to leave, needless to say definitely won’t be back!

The rooms are a let down, for the amount they charge they should really refurbish their rooms and have something modern and clean on offer… probably wont return here again. Customer service was great, location great too hut the rooms were really disappointing. If your house is 10 tomes nicer w where you go for a little holiday, there really isn’t any point.
It was amazing. Rooms Were great. I highly recommend this place.

Massive rooms
But not much for kids to do there

Best family caravan park I've stayed at so far. The facilities and activities for kids are endless and the park is like a tropical resort with all the Palm trees, birds and other features.

The caravan sites are large and everything is central to the park with.a club adjacent and another resort with 2 restaurants at if across the street.

Two of us stayed at Ingenia Holidays in Soldiers Point on our last evening of a coastal road trip. We opted for an unpowered site and like all coastal towns, prices were quite high even for a patch of fake grass. The ladies at the reception desk were really friendly and eager to share travel information with us. The park is well-maintained and has clean amenities. Thank you for our enjoyable stay.
Stayed here for a week, great palce, great accomodation and amazing staff

Great experience with the team!
Massive thanks to Sarah, Dawn and Dani.
For helping us out with our stay, bookings and service.
You guys are amazing! Can’t wait to return.

This the best location for a family holiday there is no doubt about it. We have a 2yo and a newborn and our 2yo was entertained from dawn to dusk.

Facilities.
We were able to try all besides the bowling alley as it was being fixed the imdoor pool, outdoor park and kids bike track were the winners for our little one.

Room
We stayed in an Aloha cabin. It was very modern and clean and a great size.  We were able to easily fit portacot in bunkbed room without obstructing the walkway at all.  I then left the adjoining doors open to listen to my kids from master bed at night.  The only comment I have here is I suggest byo pillow. They hurt my neck. The TV in our cabin had casting capability so we were able to watch Netflix etc without having to log into our accounts in cabin which was great

Staff
The staff were incredible everyone that we encountered were so nice and helpful from the start of our booking process till the time we left. In particular the kiosk staff were incredible sweet to my 2yo and they made him feel super special

Location
The park is located next to a club that served great meals and had a playground and a huge grassed area for the kids. We did 2 activities while away tilleys butterfly cafe which was approx 20 min and oakvale which was 30 min. Upon checking in we were given a list of local things to do which was very helpful

I will definitely be back!
An excellent family get away. Excellent customer service.Amenities and grounds were clean and wonderful facilities for the kids. We had a great time.

Such an amazing park for families always something to do even on the rainy days. And not far from the shops.
Staff are very friendly
We had a  caravan ensuite site perfect size for the van,and very clean bathroom
We will be back for sure

The Norris family had another wonderful ❤️ break.
The Park never disappoints extremely clean, excellent facilities, warm friendly staff and so much for our grandchildren to do.
We have made so many precious memories at this place and never want to leave.
Going to book again soon 😊

I honestly can’t say enough great things about this holiday park. The staff were super friendly and helpful, the cabin and  facilities were clean, the play areas well maintained and the entire “vibe” of the park was just beautiful. It was the perfect experience for my young family and the kids had an absolute blast. We would recommend this park to anyone looking for a family holiday spot and will for sure return in the future.
Excellent place to stay with kids. Reception staff amazing and friendly. Cabin was clean and had everything you need. Highly recommend.

Always enjoy the stays at this park kids away have such a amazing time
Loads of great memories here
Thanks guys!

Would not recommend! The cabin was so old and not clean - told reception and they didn’t even apologise, sent someone in to wipe the fans which were full of dust and pick up rubbish from the lounge room, definitely nothing like the pictures advertised

the rooms aren’t the cleanest. fun things  to do for kids, not much else. everything needs to be booked to access which is really annoying. everuthing also closes super early? found myself really bored here as an adult.
Excellent stay for families with young kids. We didn't even want to leave! Facilities are great and the holiday park has a great vibe and sense of community. Highly recommended.

Another great Holiday spend in the big 4 holiday park
Family enjoyed their stay, staff were great very helpful as always
would highly recommend if you haven't been go go go.

We were in a caravan and had a great time. They have an indoor and outdoor pool. The outdoor one has an awesome water slide. We were on site 19 which had no room for a car with the caravan so had to park out on the street which was a bit annoying. Location is good. Beach is about a 5m walk. Bowling club is next door and has a good bistro with playground and some friendly kookaburras. The Cheeky Dog across the road looks cool but is expensive.
There is a coffee van that comes to the park each morning and there was a food truck at night (this might be during peak times only). The local shopping strip is about 5m drive and has a Local IGA, bakery, drive through bottle shop and Saltmine Fish & Chips plus more. We were there 10 nights and never ran out of things to do. The park has an awesome Bowling ally with lots of cool games ($40 for an hour). They also do kids club activities each day which included an insect display, karaoke, temporary tattoos and more. Staff were friendly but make sure you're off your Scooters after lights out. No electric Scooters allowed.
Location was perfect. Our kids really enjoyed the vacation.
Good
Lots of fun for everyone... Nice that it was a small caravan park so it was easy to access facilities.
Awesome place. Close to Sydney. Great for families. Indoor + outdoor pool, daily activities for kids. Happy days all round.

Generally a great experience however I can’t quite come to grips with hanging your clothes on the bathroom door with a rubbish bin fixed between your hanging clothes. Would be a great idea to keep hygiene in this area the same as the rest of the park. NOT GOOD
Wow this place is amazing the service is wow woowww loved every moment and thanks so much to sarah best service

I am very upset. I have stayed at many resorts and many caravan parks and this park is way too expensive for what is offered. The photos are a complete lie everything here is small and theres major cockroach infestation. Our gas oven was leaking gas to the point my mother was throwing up! Also most of our electricity is very slow. No internet connection and the older cabins need a lot of maintenance. Will not be returning  and most definitely not recommending to anyone.
Stayed here lots of times with family this place is amazing the things for kids to do the pools ,tennis court it’s so much fun and clean and beautiful staff highly recommended

Quite possibly the best campground we have ever stayed at! They have so much to entertain the kids. Everything is so well maintained. Staff are incredibly friendly and nothing is too much trouble. Bathrooms were spotless no matter what time of day you went in. 10/10 we will be back for sure!
The cabin was beautiful comfy
Good location, very clean and a lot of activities for kids. Will be back for sure. Highly recommend. 5 stars!

Love Ingenia Holiday Park, beautiful cabin, lovely & quiet. Fabulous amenities for my grandchildren.
Clean & well maintained, can't wait to come again. Thank you
Kids loved the indoor and outdoor pools and play areas.
We found the site very clean and convenient absolutely loved staying here close to everything will definitely be back

We enjoyed our first brief visit (post-lockdown 2021) so much that we had no hesitation in returning for a longer stay.  The facilities are outstanding for a stress free family getaway and the staff are so helpful.
Great last minute get away for me and my little family.

Lovely place to stay, great location and incredible staff.
We would recommend to anyone
Highly recommend this place second time staying here kids had lots of fun so much for the kids to do here wish I had got more photos definitely will be back next year
Very tidy, excellent amenities and facilities.

We booked on the 16/10/23 and then found out the following week that the kids playground would be closed during our stay. Surely this would have been known at the time of booking and therefore should have been made aware to us before booking. Even if it wasn't aware to them at the time of our booking they should have notified us of this change rather then us having to find this out on our own. We rang afterwards to discuss this with the staff and they said 'what would you like us to do about this' as if this wasn't an issue at all. We paid full price without full use of the facilities.

Aside from that experience here are some other observations:
-clean rooms
-facilities well maintained and clean
-cabins were stocked with essentials like (washing liquid, washing sponges, cooking utensils, tea/coffee/sugar Note to staff: don't put knives in the drawers that are at kids height)
-good location that is only a short drive to all the main things to do

Loved our stay at Big4 Ingenia Holiday park at Soldiers point.

Was such an amazing space and so much for my 4 year old son to do and play with!

My sleep was a little disturbed as the mattress in the main bed of our cabin was incredibly soft, but otherwise everything was perfect.
Such an amazing, family friendly holiday spot!

What a fantastic park! We had a wonderful time. Staff were very friendly and helpful with any queries we had.  We stayed in a cabin, the cabin was lovely and clean, had all the cooking utensils and full size fridge. Comfy beds. Cabin had a bath which was handy for our toddler. The park has a indoor and outdoor pool. We only used the indoor pool as it was still a bit cold & raining and the indoor pool was great we went early in the morning and had it to ourselves. The park has great play areas for kids. A indoor soft play style for toddlers, jumping pillow and outdoor play equipment. We saw there is a bowling alley too we didn't get a chance to try it. Hopefully next time we visit. Great location next to a bowling club and the beach across the road. We had a fun time, looking forward to visiting again soon.

We absolutely loved our stay. Family of 5 with 3 x boys aged 5, 9 and 11.
The kids were constantly entertained with so much to do.

Excellent stay! Facilities are great for fam I’lliea and lots of options to make the stay fun. Nice little town with bigger shops available less then 10 mins away. RSL next door and beach across the road. Great spot! Will be back.

We spent 5 nights here and loved everything about it. The cabin was clean and well appointed, the staff were really friendly and helpful, and there was no shortage of fantastic activities for the kids to enjoy. Would absolutely go back.

We stayed in the treetop cabin , intially booked another cabin , rang the day before to change rooms the reception staff made it so easy and were great to speak to .
Our cabin was two storey with garage under Neath , the stairs inleading up to room are quite steap and there are quite a few wouldn't recommend if your not highly mobile or with little ones . But other than the stairs the cabin is amazing , 3 bedrooms very modern and bathrooms were large with normal shower head and handheld . The kitchen great size , family sized fridge and dishwasher made it more luxury . Washer and dryer were so handy to dry off wet swimmers and towels . TVs in all rooms and a large tv and family sized couch made it so relaxing , we sat with the verandah sliding doors open to allow the outside in .
The kids loved the pools , the indoor heated pool was a bit too cold for adult liking but kids were more than happy.
The beach is a block away and wouldn't call it a beach, but again the kids loved it.
Communication from staff was amazing and very accommodating to our needs, morning text to alert the coffee van was at reception ( adults loved the real coffee)
Highly recommend.

We felt a little like sardines here.
However there are great facilities and very family friendly.
The kids loved it!!
Great place for families and kids

This is the most expensive caravan park we have ever stayed in, so expensive that we were expecting mineral water to be provided. We were told over the phone and at reception there was no room for our small van, we arrived and were given a site next to a family with small children, we are an older couple it would have been nice to have been considered. Anyway I asked if we could move to a great site very private to be told again our motorhome would'nt fit, after much huffing and eye rolling by reception staff, over the radio to ground staff (they are moving to 17). Our van did fit and it was a beautiful site. Park staff very friendly.
Way out of town, a few places to eat near by, we went to the Cheeky dog and took our 2 dogs with us and felt very welcome.
Seriously guys this park is definately not worth $90 per night, this is taking advantage of being the only caravan park in the area.
We had the best family getaway.

A great park at a great location. One of the cleanest parks I have ever visited. The site was large and so clean. I love the artificial grass base for our annexe floor. The staff were lovely. Lots of places around to eat and close to many beaches. Will definitely be back.
Beautiful place. Sites are very clean and well maintained. Staff are very friendly and the kids had an absolute ball. Will definitely be back
Well kept cabins and grounds lovely staff
Great stay, the cabin was lovely, functional, clean, and the park was just perfect for families.

Loved caravan park, neat and clean.
One issue could caravans with babies and small children be placed nearer to each other and older or couples at a distance for a quieter sleep.
A noisy van with small children and baby was put beside us with 6am wake up.
I needed sleep that morning following a celebration birthday party night before.
And coffee reminders are too early.
We are here for a holiday.
Clean, well run park. Great while we were there during the week,  at the weekend it went south young families with kids out of control. We moved out on Saturday.
Great for families with kids. Lots of activities, very clean & safe.
Fabulous park for families. Lots at the park for the kids. Very clean and well maintained. Really nice staff. Highly recommend.
Really enjoyed a short break here over school holidays. Lots for the kids to do and the cabin was modern, clean and a good size for our family of 5. Would love to go back.
Great place to stay always friendly and helpful  the sms every morning to let you know the coffee van is there is a nice touch

We loved our stay here during the kids holiday. We stayed in the new treetop duplex. It was very clean and well equipped. Our only feedback would be how tight the space is between the bowling alley and the house. It was extremely difficult to get the car in and out (suv). It was frustrating when people leave their bikes by the bowling stairs as we had to leave the car and ask them to move the bikes to be able to get the car in. Other than that, we had a fabulous time, kids were well entertained. Lovely indoor play area and play field. We would return.

This was our first time staying at a Big 4/caravan park. We stayed in the Kentia cabin with our two year old. We were very pleasantly surprised by the facilities and all the activities for children and families. The cabin itself had plenty of room for us. Everything we needed in the kitchen for our stay. Beds were super comfy too! The shower is above a bath which wasn’t an issue. And the bath was amazing! So big. We actually had the three of us in it one night lol. Had some beautiful birds visit us each day and ate out of my hand. (Being careful not to attract the ibis). Our daughter loved the under 5 indoor play area. And the big jumping pillow was awesome. The pools looked great but didn’t end up going in ourselves. The indoor one felt warm and seemed popular with the kids. We used the washing machines too. They take $1 and $2 coins and they had free washing powder. If you forget your coins you can get change from the reception. We went to the soldiers club and the pub which are right next door. Amazing food and so close. Each morning a coffee cart arrives around 8am and there was also a fresh seafood can that came around one day too. Movies to borrow for the dvd player are at reception as are some lollies and drinks and basic snacks. The only things that we would have loved would be a fitness room for mum and dad to get away ;) and for the cabins to be dog friendly. We did see dogs there but only at caravan sights. We were so impressed.

Great park, plenty to do especially for children. Next to bowling club and bannisters. Boat ramp, beach and fishing jetty across the road.
Also some of the best amenities we have had in a holiday park.
Great location.
Staff excellent, amenities excellent & camp site 👍🏼  great

My family and I love staying at different big 4 parks, unfortunately we will not return to ingenia, soldiers Point, the Queen bed was very uncomfortable, felt like a 20 year old matress, saggy and lumpy,  I resorted to sleeping on a single bed and or the lounge, I was informed that I could have let them know once I arrived but obviously when you go on a holiday the last thing you want to do is pack up and move cabins, and to be honest nor should you have to, the internet well there was no service and trying hire things was difficult and unfortunately I couldn't hire the carts or the bowling alley which was disappointing as the kids wanted to do those things and we left a day early definitely not worth the $1500
Beautiful part of the world 🌎 with a really nice, neat, tidy caravan park 👌

Expensive and outdated, facilities are in need of maintenance. The location is out of the way if you want close to the Bay. Confusing when booking caravan sites online, I rang to verify and they increased the price (not happy, not a good start). We did not go back to the indoor heated pool as the screen door annoyingly kept on banging and unlatching, then the pool heater broke! The water was turned off for 1 day which was inconvenient (though we were advised a week earlier and provided 1 bottle of water, which is hard to rebook elsewhere in the holidays). For the kid's activities, an adult must also be present (no relaxing without the kids). Not the best experience, though I'm sure the oasis pool would be great in summer if not too crowded.

Friendly staff at reception and a mini shop for drinks, ice creams, hire DVDs etc. Located next door to Soldiers Point Bowling Club and across the road from Bannisters so lots of options to eat out and not have to drive. Bowling Club has good food & a great outdoor play area too (take a soccer ball for the kids!).

Pet hate - having to make your own beds on holidays! $350/night for a Kentia cabin and the kids beds/bunks only have bottom sheets on them, you have to make them up (very difficult with bunks to reach too). Absolutely don’t get why some holiday parks can’t make your beds - cabins are costly, how much longer would it take housekeeping to add a top sheet & blanket for holiday makers?!

Our Kentia cabin looked like it was recently refurbished, new floors, curtains in lounge area & new lounge which was great. Kids bedroom had frosted windows for privacy but just lace curtains over the windows so it was super bright in the mornings and as a result, kids woke up nice and early! Main bedroom had normal blinds though?!

They have a bowling alley but you need to book in advance (ie before you arrive - it was fully booked when we checked in, it was school holidays though). Mini tennis court and grassed area to play cricket and BBQ in. Grounds very well kept.

Indoor poor sign says open till “dusk”, we tried to go for a quick swim at 4.45pm after arrival (sunset officially at 4.59pm) but was quite abruptly told by a staff member that it closed at “sunset” and he suggested we should look where the sun was!! Indoor pool advertised as heated and was a big reason for picking this location for our winter getaway, but heated is an exaggeration! It was SO cool, no adults swimming only a handful of kids who don’t feel the cold.

Jumping pad great for little kids, not like the typical jumping pillow at other parks though so not for bigger kids. Bike track also good for little bikes, not bigger bikes/kids. Indoor play area for under 5s and an outdoor playground. It’s very much a park aimed at young children, not late primary school upwards.

Free internet never worked, wouldn’t connect anytime day or night in our cabin. Optus has basically no coverage and Telstra you’d be lucky to her 1 bar on 3G inside the park.

We’ve camped here a few times, first time in a cabin. Don’t think we’d rush back, not much for older kids to do compared to other parks we’ve stayed at but bring your young kids and you’d likely have a great time.
Great place to stay over winter school holidays, kids loved the indoor pool
awesome place to take kids

Mostly positive review. We camped in a tent on T21 July 2023. With an 8 and 3 yo. The showers/toilets were impressive! And there are two small square baths for young kids.  The jumping pad is huge and attached to a games room. Need more games that don’t require coins or payment to operate.  The bike track is great and the bowling alley is amazing!  The kids playground is well set out.  We hired a double Pedal kart.  It was a bit difficult for the 8yo to pedal for the hour and we took it back early. The bowling club next door has great food and a kids play area. The heated pool has a fantastic little kids area for 2+ but also a 1.5m heated pool also for the bigger kids/adults. The camp kitchen needed a bench for food prep and would love it if the camp kitchen had an outdoor area like the games room.  But the camp kitchen had two fairly new stoves/ovens and an 8 seater table. No communal pots/pans or plates/utensils. Only bad thing I have to say is the lack of respect some teenagers have using the under 5 play equipment and lack of staff roaming the ground to stop this from happening. The noise curfew was not adhered to either.  But we will be staying here again. Cabin next time. Loved our 2 night stay! Thank you :)
Loved it 😍

Unfortunately the park is not near the beaches, but is near the bay.
In the huge positives, camp sites are perfectly sized for a large van, annex and car in a row, with a little garden bed between to offer privacy.  Amazing!  Especially loved the amenities with all toilets/bathrooms unisex, new and so clean.   We've been travelling up the east coast and it was by far the best place we've stayed.

Do yourself a favour and book now
Great family holiday destination
Great place, beautiful surroundings.
Great place to stay excellent facilities and so well maintained .One of the best we have stayed in
